    A

    ALLOWED_BLOOD_TYPES - Static variable in class Validator
    Array of valid blood types that can be stored in the system.
    ALLOWED_STATUSES - Static variable in class Validator
    Array of valid status values for blood units.

    B

    BBMSMainWindow - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main GUI window for the Blood Bank Management System.
    BBMSMainWindow() - Constructor for class BBMSMainWindow
    Constructs and initializes the main Blood Bank Management window.
    BloodBankApp - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main application entry point for the Blood Bank Management System.
    BloodBankApp() - Constructor for class BloodBankApp
     
    BloodBankTestApp - Class in Unnamed Package
    Small self-contained test harness for the Blood Bank Management System.
    BloodBankTestApp() - Constructor for class BloodBankTestApp
     
    BloodUnit - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a blood unit in the blood bank management system.
    BloodUnit(String, String, LocalDate, String, String) - Constructor for class BloodUnit
    Constructs a BloodUnit with the specified parameters.

    C

    canTransitionStatus(String, String) - Static method in class Validator
    Determines if a status transition from one status to another is allowed by business rules.
    countAvailableByType(DbConfig, String) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Counts the number of available blood units of a specific type in the database.

    D

    DATE_FMT - Static variable in class Validator
    Date format pattern used throughout the system: yyyy-MM-dd.
    DbConfig - Class in Unnamed Package
    Configuration object for database connection and table/column mappings.
    DbConfig(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class DbConfig
    Constructs a DbConfig with the specified database and table configuration.
    DbConfigLoader - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that loads database configuration from a properties file.
    DbConfigLoader() - Constructor for class DbConfigLoader
     
    deleteByUnitId(DbConfig, String) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Deletes a blood unit record from the database by its unit ID.

    E

    ensureSchema(DbConfig) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Ensures the blood unit table exists in the database, creating it if necessary.

    F

    FileLoader - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class for loading blood unit records from a text file.
    FileLoader() - Constructor for class FileLoader
     

    G

    getBloodType() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the blood type of this unit.
    getBloodTypeCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for blood types.
    getDbPath() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the database file path or connection string.
    getDonationDate() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the date this blood was donated.
    getDonationDateCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for donation dates.
    getDonorId() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the unique identifier of the donor who provided this unit.
    getDonorIdCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for donor IDs.
    getExpiryDate() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the expiration date of this blood unit.
    getExpiryDateCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for expiry dates.
    getJdbcUrl() - Method in class DbConfig
    Builds and returns the JDBC connection URL for the SQLite database.
    getStatus() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the current status of this blood unit.
    getStatusCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for unit statuses.
    getTableName() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the table name for blood unit records.
    getUnitId() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns the unique identifier of this blood unit.
    getUnitIdCol() - Method in class DbConfig
    Gets the column name for unit IDs.

    I

    insert(DbConfig, BloodUnit) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Inserts a new blood unit record into the database.
    isValidBloodType(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Validates that a blood type matches one of the allowed blood types in the system.
    isValidDonorId(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Validates that a donor ID contains only letters and numbers and is between 2-30 characters.
    isValidStatus(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Validates that a status matches one of the allowed statuses in the system.
    isValidUnitId(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Validates that a unit ID contains only letters and numbers and is between 3-20 characters.

    L

    load(String) - Static method in class DbConfigLoader
    Loads database configuration from a properties file.
    load(String) - Static method in class FileLoader
    Loads blood unit records from a file.
    loadAll(DbConfig) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Loads all blood unit records from the database.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class BBMSMainWindow
    Main entry point for the Blood Bank Management System GUI.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class BloodBankApp
    Launches the application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class BloodBankTestApp
    Runs all built-in tests and prints a pass/fail summary.

    N

    normalizeBloodType(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Normalizes a blood type string by trimming whitespace and converting to uppercase.

    S

    setBloodType(String) - Method in class BloodUnit
    Sets the blood type for this unit.
    setDonationDate(LocalDate) - Method in class BloodUnit
    Sets the donation date for this unit and recalculates the expiry date.
    setDonorId(String) - Method in class BloodUnit
    Sets the donor ID for this blood unit.
    setStatus(String) - Method in class BloodUnit
    Sets the current status of this blood unit.
    setUnitId(String) - Method in class BloodUnit
    Sets the unique identifier for this blood unit.
    SQLiteBloodUnitStore - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class for SQLite database operations on blood unit records.
    SQLiteBloodUnitStore() - Constructor for class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
     

    T

    toDisplayString() - Method in class BloodUnit
    Returns a formatted string representation of this blood unit.
    tryParseDate(String) - Static method in class Validator
    Attempts to parse a date string in the required format (yyyy-MM-dd).

    U

    update(DbConfig, String, BloodUnit) - Static method in class SQLiteBloodUnitStore
    Updates an existing blood unit record in the database.

    V

    Validator - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that provides validation and normalization methods for blood unit data.
    Validator() - Constructor for class Validator
